# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

// Configuration for which paths require authentication
const PROTECTED_PATHS = ['/dashboard', '/profile', '/settings', '/api/protected'];
const PUBLIC_PATHS = ['/', '/login', '/register', '/api/auth', '/api/public', '/_next', '/favicon.ico'];
const AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = 'auth_token';
const LOGIN_URL = '/login';

// Simple constant-time string comparison to prevent timing attacks
function timingSafeEqual(a: string, b: string): boolean {
  if (a.length !== b.length) {
    // Still iterate to maintain constant time behavior
    let result = 1;
    for (let i = 0; i < Math.max(a.length, b.length); i++) {
      result |= (a.charCodeAt(i % a.length) ?? 0) ^ (b.charCodeAt(i % b.length) ?? 0);
    }
    return false;
  }
  let result = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
    result |= a.charCodeAt(i) ^ b.charCodeAt(i);
  }
  return result === 0;
}

// Decode and validate a JWT-like token (base64url encoded JSON payload)
function decodeToken(token: string): { valid: boolean; payload: TokenPayload | null } {
  try {
    const parts = token.split('.');
    if (parts.length !== 3) {
      return { valid: false, payload: null };
    }

    const [header, payload, signature] = parts;

    // Validate that all parts exist and are non-empty
    if (!header || !payload || !signature) {
      return { valid: false, payload: null };
    }

    // Decode payload
    const decodedPayload = JSON.parse(atob(payload.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/')));

    // Validate token structure
    if (!decodedPayload.sub || !decodedPayload.exp || !decodedPayload.iat) {
      return { valid: false, payload: null };
    }

    // Check expiration
    const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    if (decodedPayload.exp < now) {
      return { valid: false, payload: null };
    }

    // Check if token was issued in the future (clock skew tolerance of 60 seconds)
    if (decodedPayload.iat > now + 60) {
      return { valid: false, payload: null };
    }

    return {
      valid: true,
      payload: decodedPayload as TokenPayload,
    };
  } catch {
    return { valid: false, payload: null };
  }
}

interface TokenPayload {
  sub: string;
  exp: number;
  iat: number;
  roles?: string[];
  email?: string;
}

// Rate limiting using a simple in-memory map (per edge instance)
const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();
const RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 1000; // 1 minute
const RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS = 100;

function isRateLimited(identifier: string): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(identifier);

  if (!entry || now > entry.resetTime) {
    rateLimitMap.set(identifier, { count: 1, resetTime: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS });
    return false;
  }

  entry.count++;
  if (entry.count > RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS) {
    return true;
  }

  return false;
}

// Clean up expired rate limit entries periodically
function cleanupRateLimitMap(): void {
  const now = Date.now();
  for (const [key, value] of rateLimitMap.entries()) {
    if (now > value.resetTime) {
      rateLimitMap.delete(key);
    }
  }
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_PATHS.some(
    (publicPath) => pathname === publicPath || pathname.startsWith(publicPath + '/')
  );
}

function isProtectedPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PROTECTED_PATHS.some(
    (protectedPath) => pathname === protectedPath || pathname.startsWith(protectedPath + '/')
  );
}

function isStaticAsset(pathname: string): boolean {
  return (
    pathname.startsWith('/_next/') ||
    pathname.startsWith('/static/') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.ico') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.png') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.jpg') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.jpeg') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.svg') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.css') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.js') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.woff') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.woff2')
  );
}

// Sanitize and validate the token format before processing
function sanitizeToken(token: string): string | null {
  // Token should only contain valid base64url characters and dots
  const validTokenRegex = /^[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+$/;
  if (!validTokenRegex.test(token)) {
    return null;
  }

  // Reasonable max length for a JWT
  if (token.length > 4096) {
    return null;
  }

  return token;
}

// Add security headers to response
function addSecurityHeaders(response: NextResponse): NextResponse {
  response.headers.set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
  response.headers.set('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');
  response.headers.set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
  response.headers.set('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');
  response.headers.set(
    'Strict-Transport-Security',
    'max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload'
  );
  response.headers.set(
    'Content-Security-Policy',
    "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:;"
  );
  response.headers.set(
    'Permissions-Policy',
    'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), interest-cohort=()'
  );

  // Remove server identification headers
  response.headers.delete('X-Powered-By');
  response.headers.delete('Server');

  return response;
}

// Create an unauthorized response for API routes
function createUnauthorizedApiResponse(): NextResponse {
  const response = NextResponse.json(
    { error: 'Unauthorized', message: 'Valid authentication is required to access this resource.' },
    { status: 401 }
  );
  response.headers.set('WWW-Authenticate', 'Bearer');
  return addSecurityHeaders(response);
}

// Create a rate-limited response
function createRateLimitedResponse(): NextResponse {
  const response = NextResponse.json(
    { error: 'Too Many Requests', message: 'Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.' },
    { status: 429 }
  );
  response.headers.set('Retry-After', '60');
  return addSecurityHeaders(response);
}

export default async function middleware(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {
  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;

  // Periodic cleanup of rate limit map
  if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
    cleanupRateLimitMap();
  }

  // Allow static assets through without processing
  if (isStaticAsset(pathname)) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  // Get client identifier for rate limiting
  const clientIP =
    request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||
    request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||
    'unknown';

  // Apply rate limiting
  if (isRateLimited(clientIP)) {
    return createRateLimitedResponse();
  }

  // Allow public paths
  if (isPublicPath(pathname) && !isProtectedPath(pathname)) {
    const response = NextResponse.next();
    return addSecurityHeaders(response);
  }

  // Extract auth token from cookie or Authorization header
  let token: string | null = null;

  // Check cookie first
  const cookieToken = request.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;
  if (cookieToken) {
    token = sanitizeToken(cookieToken);
  }

  // Fall back to Authorization header (for API routes)
  if (!token) {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('Authorization');
    if (authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      const bearerToken = authHeader.slice(7);
      token = sanitizeToken(bearerToken);
    }
  }

  // No token found
  if (!token) {
    // For API routes, return 401 JSON response
    if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
      return createUnauthorizedApiResponse();
    }

    // For page routes, redirect to login
    const loginUrl = new URL(LOGIN_URL, request.url);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('callbackUrl', pathname);
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);

    // Clear any invalid auth cookies
    response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);

    return addSecurityHeaders(response);
  }

  // Validate the token
  const { valid, payload } = decodeToken(token);

  if (!valid || !payload) {
    // Token is invalid or expired
    if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
      const response = createUnauthorizedApiResponse();
      response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
      return response;
    }

    // Redirect to login and clear the invalid cookie
    const loginUrl = new URL(LOGIN_URL, request.url);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('callbackUrl', pathname);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('error', 'session_expired');
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
    return addSecurityHeaders(response);
  }

  // Token is valid - proceed with the request
  const response = NextResponse.next();

  // Add user information to request headers for downstream use
  response.headers.set('x-user-id', payload.sub);
  if (payload.email) {
    response.headers.set('x-user-email', payload.email);
  }
  if (payload.roles) {
    response.headers.set('x-user-roles', payload.roles.join(','));
  }

  // Check if token is close to expiring (within 5 minutes) and set a header to signal refresh
  const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
  const timeUntilExpiry = payload.exp - now;
  if (timeUntilExpiry < 300) {
    response.headers.set('x-token-refresh-needed', 'true');
  }

  // Refresh the cookie expiration on each valid request
  response.cookies.set(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, token, {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: true,
    sameSite: 'lax',
    path: '/',
    maxAge: timeUntilExpiry,
  });

  return addSecurityHeaders(response);
}

// Configure which routes the middleware runs on
export const config = {
  matcher: [
    /*
     * Match all request paths except:
     * - _next/static (static files)
     * - _next/image (image optimization files)
     * - favicon.ico (favicon file)
     */
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image).*)',
  ],
};
